title: exocarpos humifusus
intro: Exocarpos humifusus, also known as the drooping sheoak or drooping sheoak bush, is a shrub native to Australia and is a member of the sandalwood family (Santalaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used in Australian Aboriginal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Exocarpos humifusus include its potential to treat wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, although more research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for use.
